ideasFromTeam.rationale: The ALTERNATE store build documented as teaching content ('How to Build a Business with AI') creates Layer 2 (personal brand) content while building Layer 3 (creative business). Two layers in one action.
9 consecutive days of payment failures across 3 services. Pattern: single card issue. Need: backup payment method system or automated alerts before due dates.
Every new task should be tagged by layer (1/2/3). Tasks that don't fit a layer = deprioritize or drop. This prevents scope creep.
